message:
test(wave-43): add 8 pure data-type tests for service/layer, runtime/{region_table,region_heap,timer}

Cover Identity, Stack, RegionCreateError, HeapStats, HeapIndex, HeapRef,
RegionHeap, and TimerHeap derive traits (Debug, Clone, Copy, Default,
PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Display, Error).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
